text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, October 19. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Let's organize the menu. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
